backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented features, related frontend files, components, and test coverage for the calculator app.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries describing frontend styles, config, core components, and calculator modules.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers and OKLCH variable-driven dark/light theme for the app.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file that loads the React app through main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level UI with tabbed navigation for pressure, temperature, and flow calculators, plus header and footer.
frontend/src/features/calculators/calcul: Provides pressure, temperature, and flow calculation functions including unit conversions and formula lookup.
frontend/src/features/calculators/FlowCa: React component for flow rate calculation with inputs, unit selection, validation, and real‑time results.
frontend/src/features/calculators/Pressu: React component for pressure calculation providing inputs, unit controls, validation, and computed outputs.
frontend/src/features/calculators/Temper: React component for temperature conversion with input validation, unit selection, result computation, and error handling.
frontend/src/features/calculators/valida: Contains numeric and Kelvin validation utilities plus a helper to parse numeric values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current Internet Identity using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook for login, logout, identity loading, and auth state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for future React Query hooks; currently empty.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light/dark themes, industrial design tokens, and calculator component styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point initializing React Query, Internet Identity provider, and rendering the app.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with theme extensions, color tokens, fonts, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata, existing feature list, and a pending request for a calculator app handling pressure, temperature, and flow. Includes versioning and UI/theme requirements.
